organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Ben-Gurion University of the Negev

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
The Hebrew University of Jerusalem is Israel's first university, formed in 1918 and opened in 1925. Today, there are over 23,000 students enrolled at the University, including undergraduates, master's degree students, and doctoral candidates.

The university has four campuses: Mount Scopus, The Edmond J. Safra (Givat Ram) Campus, and Ein Kerem (in Jerusalem), and Rehovot.

Hebrew University Alumni are invited to visit https://alumni.huji.ac.il
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Hebrew University of Jerusalem

companyResolutionResult.description:
CrowdStrike (Nasdaq: CRWD), a global cybersecurity leader, has redefined modern security with the world’s most advanced cloud-native platform for protecting critical areas of enterprise risk — endpoints and cloud workloads, identity and data.

Powered by the CrowdStrike Security Cloud and world-class AI, the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform leverages real-time indicators of attack, threat intelligence, evolving adversary tradecraft and enriched telemetry from across the enterprise to deliver hyper-accurate detections, automated protection and remediation, elite threat hunting and prioritized observability of vulnerabilities.

Purpose-built in the cloud with a single lightweight-agent architecture, the Falcon platform delivers rapid and scalable deployment, superior protection and performance, reduced complexity and immediate time-to-value.

CrowdStrike: We stop breaches.
companyResolutionResult.name: CrowdStrike

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
ביה"ס הריאלי העברי בחיפה הנו מוסד חינוכי עצמאי (וחל"ץ). תלמידינו, המתקבלים לביה"ס בתהליך של מיון ובחירה, נהנים ממסלול חינוך רצוף מגן ועד י"ב, ומתחנכים לאור חזון ביה"ס: "להיות מוסד חינוכי איכותי, מוביל ומתווה דרך, המכוון את תלמידיו להיות בני אדם, מעורבים ומשפיעים בחברה הישראלית".

מאז היווסדו בשנת תרע"ד (1913) על רקע "מלחמת השפות" והדרישה לייסד בית ספר ריאלי שיהיה כולו עברי – התפתח ביה"ס לאורם של מאורעות מרכזיים ביישוב היהודי ובמדינה תוך שהוא משמש חלוץ ומצפן בעשייה החינוכית בישראל. בין המפעלים החינוכיים ש"נולדו" אצלנו ואומצו על ידי משרד החינוך ניתן למנות את ייסוד הצופים, הגדנ"ע, "השירות הלאומי", ה"מחויבות האישית", ה"חיבור השנתי", "חברת התלמידים", מקצועות האזרחות, המזרחנות ועוד.

כיום מונה ביה"ס כ- 4,000 תלמידים בשישה סניפים וכ- 500 אנשי סגל, כ- 80 מתוכם בוגרי ביה"ס. לכל סניף בביה"ס מאפיין ייחודי משלו, תחת תפיסה חינוכית כוללת:

מתחם הדר - מדעים ואומנויות
מרכז הכרמל (מטו"ס) - מדע, טבע וסביבה
מתחם אחוזה - מנהיגות ותקשורת
החטיבה העליונה בבית בירם המציעה מעל 50 צירופי מקצועות
אשכול גנים ירוק - בקמפוס בית בירם

התלמידים שלנו מגיעים לביה"ס מרחבי העיר חיפה ומהפריפריה, מנהריה בצפון דרך יקנעם במזרח ועד זיכרון יעקב בדרו�...

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Zero To Mastery is the most efficient and supportive way for you to learn in-demand skills, get hired in a high paying job, and advance your career.

We provide the tools, resources, and environment (1,000,000+ students taught so far) so that you can take control of your life and unlock endless exciting new career opportunities in the world of technology, no matter your background or experience.

Zero To Mastery is a perfect for you if:

◼ You're struggling to make progress using free tutorials that are often incomplete, outdated, and don't give you the structure or clear path to achieving your goals.

◼ You want to learn the most up-to-date and in-demand skills that are actually being used by top companies.

https://zerotomastery.io/courses/

◼ You can't or don't want to spend $8,000+ on a bootcamp but you're ready to take the next step in your career.

https://zerotomastery.io/academy/

◼ You don't want to waste your valuable time on topics that don't matter. Instead, you want a clear step-by-step roadmap to go from zero (or any skill level) to getting hired.

https://zerotomastery.io/career-paths/

◼ You want to learn from world-class instructors that teach you from their years of real-world experience at industry leading companies.

https://zerotomastery.io/about/

◼ You don't want to learn alone. You want to be part of a supportive community of like-minded individuals who work together and help each other learn new skills, advance their careers and want to continue to improve.

https://zerotomastery.io/community/developer-community-discord/

◼ You want to learn at your own pace, using our proven outcome-driven methods. Anytime, anywhere.

https://zerotomastery.io/testimonials/

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Approximately 36 years before Israel declared independence, a ceremony took place on the barren slopes of Mount Carmel near the Port of Haifa, which was then occupied by the Ottoman Empire. Unknown to the Haifa community witnessing the event, this would be a milestone in history. This first cornerstone embodied an implausible vision of creating a world-class institute of scientific and technological education in the Holy Land.
The story of the “Technikum” – the original German name of the Technion – is a tale of the century. The second industrial revolution created the printing presses and communications infrastructure allowing Jews scattered around the globe to organize in face of rising anti-Semitism. As Jews were often barred from technical education, the establishment of a technical school was a first priority to rebuilding a Jewish homeland. The Technion was to become a unique worldwide university that would precede, create, shape, and protect a modern state.
The cornerstone laid on April 11, 1912, set in motion a century of progress responding to national and global needs. Technion – Israel Institute of Technology would grow rapidly, becoming a global pioneer in fields such as biotechnology, stem cell research, space, computer science, nanotechnology, and energy. 
Four Technion professors have won Nobel Prizes. As it approaches its centennial in 2025 – 100 years after the first class took place – Technion City is a thriving world center of trailblazing excellence in research and teaching for the benefit of humanity, with 18 faculties, more than 14,000 students, 135 academic programs, and 60 research institutes. Since the Technion opened its doors, more than 90,000 Technion alumni have played a huge part in creating and leading the ‘Startup Nation,’ impacting the lives of millions of people worldwide.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Technion - Israel Institute of Technology

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Afeka Tel Aviv Academic College of Engineering
Welcome to the Afeka Tel Aviv Academic College of Engineering!

Located at the heart of the Israeli high-tech industry in Tel Aviv, the Afeka Academic College of Engineering has positioned itself as one of the leading institutions for engineering studies in Israel. Afeka offers a strong and cutting-edge academic program that produces highly skilled and professional engineers. The exceptional level of training, coupled with Afeka's strong ties to the industry, paves the way for Afeka graduates to position themselves at the forefront of the Israeli and International engineering community.

The Afeka Academic College of Engineering is accredited by the Israel Council for Higher Education and offers B.Sc. degrees in the following fields of engineering:

Medical Engineering
Electrical Engineering
Mechanical Engineering
Industrial Engineering and Management
Software Engineering
Computer Science
Data Science


M.Sc. Program in:
Medical Engineering
Intelligent Systems
Systems Engineering
Energy and Power Systems Engineering
Industrial engineering and management

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Ben-Gurion University of the Negev

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Combining world-class academic excellence with a unique approach to education and social responsibility, SCE is much more than a college; it is a source of inspiration and cultivation which encourages forward-thinking and facilitates significant achievements. "Engineering the future" is both our promise and our mission, which propels our students forward and leads them to set an example of excellence amongst their peers and within their communities. With two campuses located in southern Israel, a continuously growing body of over 6,000 students, six different engineering tracks and new faculty of design and architecture, SCE is, and will always be, a pioneering academic powerhouse. 

At SCE, engineering goes way beyond the academic framework; it is a way of thinking, analyzing and solving fundamental questions that design the way people live their lives. Driven by a vision of outstanding education and social responsibility, SCE is committed to the pursuit of excellence, innovation, and promoting all communities. It is noteworthy that since its founding the Sami Shamoon College of Engineering has qualified more than 11,000 BA and MA graduates that comprise an integral part of the SCE and its future. More than 95% of our graduates are employed in their profession and education field, and more than 30% have pursued advanced degrees. SCE graduates, that currently make up about 15% of the total number of engineers working in high-tech fields in Israel, are the SCE’s main contribution to the growth of Israel’s economy and security.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: SCE - Shamoon College of Engineering

companyResolutionResult.description:
Connecteam is the leading platform for managing deskless teams, trusted by over 80,000 businesses worldwide.

We built Connecteam for real operators - the people running shifts, jobs, and teams across locations and sites. The kind of work that doesn’t happen behind a desk, and doesn’t have time for messy spreadsheets, scattered group chats, or complex tools that don’t communicate with one another.

Connecteam brings daily operations and team communication into one intuitive app - from hiring and scheduling to training, tasks, and day-to-day coordination. It gives teams the clarity and control they need to run the day - shift after shift, task after task.

Backed by $220M+ from Insights Partners, Stripes, and Tiger Global, Connecteam is rapidly expanding worldwide - empowering frontline teams to work smarter, stay connected, and operate with greater efficiency.

Follow us:
https://linktr.ee/connecteam
companyResolutionResult.name: Connecteam

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Welcome to the Jerusalem College of Technology (JCT), a leading institution where technological innovation meets traditional Judaic studies in the heart of Jerusalem. At JCT, we provide world-class education in technology, health sciences and business, coupled with a rich Judaic studies program that prepares students for leadership in a globalized world.

About Us:

At JCT, we are committed to excellence in education. Our programs in engineering, computer science, health sciences, business, and more are designed to equip students with cutting-edge technical skills and a strong ethical foundation. Our unique blend of modern technology and Jewish values offers a distinctive educational experience.

Why choose JCT?

Top-Tier Education: Our esteemed faculty deliver high-quality instruction in various fields, preparing our students for their future careers.

Comprehensive Judaic Studies: Students don’t have to choose between academic excellence and spiritual growth. Our Judaic studies program is designed to enhance both. Our top-level shiurim and rich religious environment allow students to deepen their spiritual and ethical development while pursuing their academic and professional goals.

Strategic Location: Situated in the historic and vibrant city of Jerusalem, JCT provides a stimulating academic environment enriched by cultural, spiritual and intellectual opportunities.

Supportive Community: We offer a collaborative community where students, faculty, and alumni support each other. Our focus on mentorship and career development ensures that students have the resources they need to excel.

Connect with us to learn more about our programs, events, and opportunities.

Stay Connected: Follow our LinkedIn page for updates, news, and insights. Visit our website or contact us for more information.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Jerusalem College of Technology

educations.schoolName: Lev Academic Center (JCT) (Jerusalem College of Technology )

companyResolutionResult.description:
Making ecommerce brands agent-ready for the era of AI-driven commerce.

The internet is shifting - from clicks to conversations, from static websites to dynamic, agentic storefronts. ChatGPT, Gemini, and Copilot start to shape the way people discover and buy products, brands need to ensure their catalogs are not just optimized for search - but ready for agents.

That’s where 40RTY.ai comes in.

We help brands prepare their storefronts for this new reality through:

Catalog Audit - Understand how discoverable your products are to AI models.

Competitor Feeds - Benchmark how your products appear in the agentic marketplace.

Agent Optimization Tools - Make your catalog fully compatible with the new LLM-driven discovery layer.

Follow us for regular updates on market trends, product announcements, partnerships and everything that will help you navigate during this exciting times.
companyResolutionResult.name: 40RTY | Agentic Commerce

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Approximately 36 years before Israel declared independence, a ceremony took place on the barren slopes of Mount Carmel near the Port of Haifa, which was then occupied by the Ottoman Empire. Unknown to the Haifa community witnessing the event, this would be a milestone in history. This first cornerstone embodied an implausible vision of creating a world-class institute of scientific and technological education in the Holy Land.
The story of the “Technikum” – the original German name of the Technion – is a tale of the century. The second industrial revolution created the printing presses and communications infrastructure allowing Jews scattered around the globe to organize in face of rising anti-Semitism. As Jews were often barred from technical education, the establishment of a technical school was a first priority to rebuilding a Jewish homeland. The Technion was to become a unique worldwide university that would precede, create, shape, and protect a modern state.
The cornerstone laid on April 11, 1912, set in motion a century of progress responding to national and global needs. Technion – Israel Institute of Technology would grow rapidly, becoming a global pioneer in fields such as biotechnology, stem cell research, space, computer science, nanotechnology, and energy. 
Four Technion professors have won Nobel Prizes. As it approaches its centennial in 2025 – 100 years after the first class took place – Technion City is a thriving world center of trailblazing excellence in research and teaching for the benefit of humanity, with 18 faculties, more than 14,000 students, 135 academic programs, and 60 research institutes. Since the Technion opened its doors, more than 90,000 Technion alumni have played a huge part in creating and leading the ‘Startup Nation,’ impacting the lives of millions of people worldwide.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Technion - Israel Institute of Technology

companyResolutionResult.description:
SolarEdge is a global leader in smart energy technology. By leveraging world-class engineering capabilities and with a relentless focus on innovation, SolarEdge creates smart energy solutions that power our lives and drive future progress.
Established in 2006, SolarEdge developed the DC optimized inverter solution that changed the way power is harvested and managed in photovoltaic (PV) systems. The SolarEdge intelligent inverter solution maximizes power generation while lowering the cost of energy produced by the PV system, for improved RoI.
Continuing to advance smart energy, SolarEdge addresses a broad range of energy market segments through its diversified product offering, including residential, commercial and large scale PV, battery storage and backup solutions, EV charging, home energy management, grid services and virtual power plants, and uninterrupted power supply (UPS) solutions
companyResolutionResult.name: SolarEdge Technologies

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Reichman University (previously IDC Herzliya), the first private institution of higher education in Israel, opened its doors in 1994 thanks to the vision of Prof. Uriel Reichman. Reichman University's ten schools offer innovative, dynamic undergraduate and graduate programs that educate Israel's future business, juridical, high-tech, communications, economics, and civic leaders. 
All of the academic programs provide students with both a solid theoretical background and the practical interdisciplinary skills that are essential for success in the 21st century. 

The university’s alumni are leading key positions at government agencies, high-tech companies, and financial institutions. 

Reichman University is unique in its educational methods, which are based on an interdisciplinary approach and the teaching of information technology and global markets. It combines theory with real-world experience and provides its students with proficiencies. 

Our basic outlook, which is rooted in the twin concepts of individual freedom and responsibility, emphasizes student entrepreneurship and leadership alongside a commitment to community service.

Follow us on all social media channels >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

מטרת אוניברסיטת רייכמן (לשעבר הבינתחומי) היא להכשיר את מנהיגות העתיד של מדינת ישראל, באמצעות השכלה בינתחומית, המשלבת ידע תיאורטי מעמיק עם הכשרה מעשית, ובהנחיית סגל מרצים וחוקרים מהאוניברסיטאות המובילות בעולם ובישראל. גישתנו היא הקפדה על מצוינות במחקר ובהוראה, לצד דגש על אחריות חברתית ומעורבות בקהילה. מאז הקמתו, הצליח הבינתחומי הרצליה להיות חלוץ בתחומים רבים ולהוביל מהפכה במערכת ההשכלה הגבוהה בישראל, שאת עקבותיה ניתן לראות כיום במוסדות אקדמיים אחרים.

עקבו אחרינו בכל הרשתות החברתיות >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Approximately 36 years before Israel declared independence, a ceremony took place on the barren slopes of Mount Carmel near the Port of Haifa, which was then occupied by the Ottoman Empire. Unknown to the Haifa community witnessing the event, this would be a milestone in history. This first cornerstone embodied an implausible vision of creating a world-class institute of scientific and technological education in the Holy Land.
The story of the “Technikum” – the original German name of the Technion – is a tale of the century. The second industrial revolution created the printing presses and communications infrastructure allowing Jews scattered around the globe to organize in face of rising anti-Semitism. As Jews were often barred from technical education, the establishment of a technical school was a first priority to rebuilding a Jewish homeland. The Technion was to become a unique worldwide university that would precede, create, shape, and protect a modern state.
The cornerstone laid on April 11, 1912, set in motion a century of progress responding to national and global needs. Technion – Israel Institute of Technology would grow rapidly, becoming a global pioneer in fields such as biotechnology, stem cell research, space, computer science, nanotechnology, and energy. 
Four Technion professors have won Nobel Prizes. As it approaches its centennial in 2025 – 100 years after the first class took place – Technion City is a thriving world center of trailblazing excellence in research and teaching for the benefit of humanity, with 18 faculties, more than 14,000 students, 135 academic programs, and 60 research institutes. Since the Technion opened its doors, more than 90,000 Technion alumni have played a huge part in creating and leading the ‘Startup Nation,’ impacting the lives of millions of people worldwide.

companyResolutionResult.description:
Momentick is a satellite-based methane intelligence company built for complex operations.

We use multi-satellite data and proprietary AI solutions to detect and quantify emissions across vast, remote, and high-impact sites—no hardware, no installation, no integration, and no boots on the ground.

From pinpoint leaks to large-region sites, our platform enables cost-effective, autonomous monitoring that supports both mitigation and compliance.

🔹 Pinpoint and large-area monitoring for onshore and offshore assets
🔹 AI-powered insights from multi-satellite constellations
🔹 Actionable data for regulatory and ESG reporting
🔹 Frequent revisit rates 
🔹 Zero deployment. Fully remote and software-only
🔹 Scales across assets, regions, and portfolios

📩 hello@momentick.com
If you can’t measure it, you can’t reduce it.
companyResolutionResult.name: Momentick - Emissions Intelligence

currentPositions.description: Develop algorithms for GHG emissions detection based on of machine learning, and remote sensing analysis tools. Research and development of simulations for methane detection and quantification through image processing. Analyzing spectral phenomena in images over time, providing valuable insights into the dynamics and patterns of GHG emissions.

companyResolutionResult.description:
BioCatch prevents financial crime by recognizing patterns in human behavior.

We continuously collect more than 3,000 anonymized data points – keystroke and mouse activity, touch screen behavior, physical device attributes, and more – as people interact with their digital banking platforms. With these inputs, our machine-learning models reveal patterns in user behavior and provide device intelligence that, together, distinguish the criminal from the legitimate.

Today, more than 30 of the world's largest 100 banks and 287 total financial institutions deploy our solutions, analyzing 16 billion user sessions per month and protecting 532 million people around the world from fraud and financial crime.

Fraud is incessant, pervasive, and ever-evolving. It’s relentless. And that's why, at BioCatch, we fight to make banking safer every day.
companyResolutionResult.name: BioCatch
